creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of databases/p5-DBI

diff -urN databases/p5-DBI/pkg/DESCR.orig databases/p5-DBI/pkg/DESCR
--- databases/p5-DBI/pkg/DESCR.orig     Fri Jan 21 10:23:20 2000
+++ databases/p5-DBI/pkg/DESCR  Fri Jan 21 10:23:33 2000
@@ -9,3 +9,5 @@
 This strategy enables the DBI and drivers to serve a useful purpose
 whilst allowing the real interface to evolve with experience behind the
 emulation interface.
+
+WWW: http://forteviot.symbolstone.org/technology/perl/DBI/
